claims.subject: MexEF-OprN
claims.evidence_span: overproduced in clinical isolates, confers resistance to fluoroquinolones

claims.subject: MexEF-OprN
claims.evidence_span: confers resistance to fluoroquinolones, trimethoprim, and chloramphenicol

claims.evidence_span: confers resistance to fluoroquinolones, trimethoprim, and chloramphenicol

claims.subject: MexF P136 substitution
claims.evidence_span: substitutions at P136 enhanced efflux of most tested antibiotics, among which are 21 fluoroquinolones

claims.subject: MexF D132 mutation
claims.evidence_span: Mutations at four selected positions D132, P136, G626, and S729 altered resistance profiles and substrate specificity

claims.subject: MexF S729 mutation
claims.evidence_span: Substitutions in S729...either enhanced or severely impaired MexF activity

claims.subject: MexF
claims.evidence_span: MexF is optimized to trimethoprim-like compounds
